lemmas.statement: (xs : List ℕ) (hsort : sort xs = sorted_xs) (y : ℕ) (ih' : sorted (z :: zs) = true → sorted (insort x (z :: zs)) = true) (hle : ¬x ≤ y) (hyx : y ≤ x) (hzs : sorted (z :: zs) = true) (x : ℕ) (z : ℕ) (zs : List ℕ) (hyz : y ≤ z) (hxz : ¬x ≤ z) (hins : insort x (z :: zs) = z :: insort x zs) (h1 : sorted (z :: insort x zs) = true) : sorted (y :: insort x (z :: zs)) = true

premises: ih : ∀ (n : ℕ), drop n (xs ++ ys) = drop n xs ++ drop (n - length xs) ys
lemmas.conclusion: drop n xs ++ drop (n - length xs) ys = drop n xs ++ drop (n + 1 - (1 + length xs)) ys
lemmas.statement: (ys : List α) (x : α) (xs : List α) (ih : ∀ (n : ℕ), drop n (xs ++ ys) = drop n xs ++ drop (n - length xs) ys) (n : ℕ) : drop n xs ++ drop (n - length xs) ys = drop n xs ++ drop (n + 1 - (1 + length xs)) ys

premises: ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)
lemmas.statement: (x : α) (xs : List α) (ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)) (n : ℕ) (m : ℕ) : drop (n + 1) (take (m + 1) (x :: xs)) = take (m + 1 - (n + 1)) (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs))

premises: ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.conclusion: zip' (reverse xs ++ [x]) (reverse ys ++ [y]) = reverse (zip' xs ys) ++ [(x, y)]
lemmas.statement: (x : α) (y : β) (h : length (x :: xs) = length (y :: ys)) (xs : List α) (ih : ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)) (ys : List β) (h' : length xs = length ys) : zip' (reverse xs ++ [x]) (reverse ys ++ [y]) = reverse (zip' xs ys) ++ [(x, y)]

premises: ih : sorted ys = true → sorted (insort x ys) = true
lemmas.statement: (x : ℕ) (y : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (ih : sorted ys = true → sorted (insort x ys) = true) (h : sorted (y :: ys) = true) (hle : ¬x ≤ y) : sorted (y :: insort x ys) = true
